---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve ResiliPlan
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Videos

If applicable, add screenshots or videos to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **ResiliPlan version:** [e.g., 1.0.0]
- **Deployment:** [e.g., Docker Compose, manual]
- **OS:** [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14]
- **Docker version:** [e.g., 24.0.7]
- **Browser** (if web UI): [e.g., Chrome 125, Firefox 126]
- **AI provider** (if using AI): [e.g., OpenAI gpt-4o, Anthropic claude-sonnet-4-5]

## Logs

```
Paste relevant logs here (with sensitive data redacted)
```

## Severity

- [ ] Critical (data loss, security vulnerability, complete breakage)
- [ ] High (major feature broken, workaround difficult)
- [ ] Medium (feature broken but workaround exists)
- [ ] Low (minor issue, cosmetic)

## Possible Solution

If you have suggestions on how to fix the bug, please share.

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem: frequency, related issues, etc.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have tried the latest version
- [ ] I have included relevant logs
- [ ] I have redacted sensitive data (API keys, passwords, etc.)
